description_long: This object is a pair of glasses with a minimalist, rectangular frame design. The frame is thin and straight, with a full-rim structure that encircles the lenses completely. The lenses are small, rectangular, and dark-tinted, suggesting a possible use as sunglasses or protective eyewear. The temples are straight and slender, curving gently at the ends to fit over the ears, and lack any visible embellishments or patterns. The bridge connecting the lenses is flat and integrated seamlessly into the frame, with no visible nose pads or additional support structures. The overall style is utilitarian and modern, with a focus on simplicity and function.
description: A minimalist pair of rectangular glasses with thin, straight temples and dark-tinted lenses, featuring a full-rim frame and a flat bridge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular lenses, full-rim frame, and flat bridge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin, straight profile of the temples and the overall slimness of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, highlighting the lens shape and frame symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slender, straight temples and minimal frame thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, thin, and straight full-rim frame with a minimalist, modern style and no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark, opaque black tint with uniform coloration and no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Flat, integrated bridge with no visible nose pads or additional support, forming a continuous line between the lenses.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, slender, and unadorned, curving gently at the ends without any patterns or decorative elements.
